issues.description: PowerBoost duration should be "DuringYourTurn" not "EndOfTurn". The card text explicitly states "during this turn", which means the effect lasts only for your current turn, not until end of turn.

AttachDon target restriction missing. The card specifies "1 of your {Sky Island} type Leader or Character cards", but the DSL target only uses "ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader" without the Sky Island type filter.

KO action should conditionally target only Characters with 0 power or less, but current DSL targets all opponent Characters. The effect text says "K.O. all of your opponent's Characters with 0 power or less", implying a conditional check.
